docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF LACRICIA PELESEUMA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERIK NIELSEN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2024 - JUDGMENT.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PELESEUMA, LACRICIA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,544.08 FILED BY PELESEUMA, LACRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, ERIK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, ERIK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $85 SERVED APR-19-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT NIELSEN, ERIK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PELESEUMA, LACRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NIELSEN, ERIK $8,544.08 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,629.08 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
